title: Boris Galerkin
body: Boris Grigoryevich Galerkin (Russian: Бори́с Григо́рьевич Галёркин, surname more accurately romanized as Galyorkin; 4 March [O.S. 20 February] 1871–12 July 1945) was a Soviet mathematician and an engineer.
categories: Academic staff of Military Engineering-Technical University
Articles needing additional references from July 2020
Articles with unsourced statements from January 2023
Full Members of the USSR Academy of Sciences
Recipients of the Order of Lenin
